channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'The Office' star criticizes political 'hypocrisy' and says sitcom could not be made today
item.description: Rainn Wilson argues cancel culture would prevent The Office from being produced now, and calls out partisan hypocrisy on both sides for deepening divisions.

item.title: Trump's Rural Support Declines as Fuel and Food Costs Rise, Reuters/Ipsos Poll Finds
item.description: Brian Rauch feels the pinch of higher gas prices on his 30-mile drives from his home in rural Stevensville, Montana, to the doctor's office.

item.title: Special Edition of 'Reagan' Biopic Returns to Theaters for America250
Trump endorses MAGA ally Mike Collins in Georgia's Republican Senate runoff
item.description: Trump backs Rep. Mike Collins in Georgia's Republican Senate runoff against Derek Dooley, who is supported by Gov. Kemp, ahead of Tuesday's key vote.
